definition: Mods can be 2 types - client side or server side, client side mods just effect the client side of the game, so mostly the visuals and server side mods effect the code of the game / what the game does. Most mods you will encounter here are technical tools to help players build and debug complex redstone. An example of a server side mod is sodium, which improves game preformance, whilst litematica a client side mod is mostly visual and helps the player build
